_comment: Per-item alchemy sell value (gold) and cube EXP, keyed by ItemKey. Source: TBH wiki (ported
from the reference app gamedata.js DB.itemSell / DB.itemCubeExp). Alchemy gold is not cleanly
readable from game memory for arbitrary items (it is a UI-computed conversion), so wiki is the
documented fallback here per the project data policy. NOT game-verified — treat like any other
wiki numeric parameter. A future check could compare a real alchemy gold delta against sell[k].
